//: PharmaLedger does NOT use the Firebase Realtime Database — all data lives in Firestore (see CONTEXT.md Section 2). This ruleset exists only because the Firebase project has an RTDB instance provisioned by default. It is locked down completely: no reads, no writes, from anyone, ever. If a future phase intentionally adopts RTDB for something, replace this file deliberately — don't loosen it by accident.
